title: Soenda Presents
excerpt: Light design for the dance floor — capturing the energy and impression of light in motion.
description: Light design and atmosphere for Soenda Presents. These moments capture the energy and impression of the lights on the dance floor — built and operated live for the night.
credits: Light & design: Jaco Schilp. Photos: Elske Nissen. Production: ESWA licht en geluid. With Lammer at Soenda.
